title: Pledge defined
doc_html:
TITLE XX-A. PLEDGE

CHAPTER 1. GENERAL PROVISIONS

Art. 3141. Pledge defined

            Pledge is a real right established by contract over property of the kind described in Article 3142 to secure performance of an obligation.

            Acts 2014, No. 281, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
doc_text:
TITLE XX-A. PLEDGE
CHAPTER 1. GENERAL PROVISIONS
Art. 3141.  Pledge defined
Pledge is a real right established by contract over property of the kind described in
Article 3142 to secure performance of an obligation.
Acts 2014, No. 281, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
